examples: When they got to the United States, a churchman warmly helped place them in a homeless shelter in New York.
He was a famous Protestant churchman, but I didn't like him.
A Protestant churchman came to talk to her, 'My lady,' he said.
The Ugandan-born churchman has espoused a weird variety of causes, making him impossible to categorise.
An outspoken South African churchman, Frank Chikane, almost died when his underpants were dusted with toxins.
